headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on AvalonBay Communities, Lowers Price Target to $190
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) with a Sector Perform and lowers the price target from $193 to $190.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on AvalonBay Communities, Lowers Price Target to $201
